title: Backend Engineer, TURKEY
description: About nsave nsave is a fintech company headquartered in London. Founded by Amer Baroudi and Abdallah AbuHashem, our vision is to "Protect and grow the wealth of the financially excluded". We have built a global platform that provide trusted USD accounts, global payments, and investments for individuals from distressed economies, where inflation is high and banking systems are unstable. Our compliance-by-design approach and proprietary technology allow us to deliver these services securely and at scale. To date, nsave has raised $22M from leading investors including Sequoia Capital, TQ Ventures, Y Combinator, and SV Angel. Our team has grown 200% in the last year, and with so much more ahead, we're just getting started! Learn more at www.nsave.com . 📍 Location: Turkey 🧾 Engagement Type: Independent Contractor About the Role As our Backend Engineer , you will build and scale the infrastructure powering nsave's financial services. Working closely with the CTO and engineering team, you'll own critical backend subsystems — from service architecture and reliability to security and compliance integrations — serving tens of thousands of users across multiple jurisdictions. Who You Are Strong engineering fundamentals: You build and optimise software systems with solid knowledge of clean architecture, layered abstractions, and complexity tradeoffs Broad platform knowledge: You're comfortable across backend architecture, databases, site reliability, infrastructure as code, and CI/CD Security-minded: You can design and manage robust financial systems with high security and compliance requirements Business-oriented: Your technical decisions are informed by product and business context, and you know how to balance speed with quality How You'll Make a Difference Design, implement, and own critical infrastructure — including service architecture, reliability, build and release, and integration with compliance and banking services Proactively improve system health by identifying weak spots in the codebase and infrastructure, and prioritising fixes Collaborate with engineering, product, and operations teams to ship features across multiple markets Contribute to engineering best practices, code quality, and process improvements as we scale What We're Looking For Experience in backend engineering, platform engineering, or infrastructure roles Proficiency in backend languages and frameworks relevant to scalable financial systems Ability to operate independently and execute in fast-moving environments Experience in startups, fintech, or regulated environments is strongly preferred nsave Values Alongside professional excellence, we look for people whose values align with ours: Service — "Mission First": We put the mission, our customers, and our team above self. Urgency — "Stay focused. Move fast": We act with urgency and intention, concentrating on what matters most. Ownership — "Act as an Owner": We take responsibility for outcomes end-to-end. Standards — "Pursue Excellence": We hold ourselves to high personal standards and continuously improve. Please apply only if you: Are deeply motivated by nsave's mission and the problems we are solving Thrive in high-ownership, high-accountability environments Are comfortable operating with urgency and ambiguity Want to build from first principles in an early-stage, high-growth company Contractor Classification Notice This role is offered on a freelance / independent contractor basis. Contractors are not employees of nsave and are responsible for their own taxes, insurance, and statutory obligations. nsave is an equal opportunity organisation. We welcome applications from all backgrounds and do not discriminate on the basis of age, gender, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for team members to join PayTR as “ Full Stack Developers .” QUALIFICATIONS WE ARE LOOKING FOR • BS Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience, • Strong proficiency in PHP and Laravel (experience with C# / ASP.NET Core and/or Node.js is a big plus), • Strong proficiency in JavaScript and React (experience with Vue.js and/or Angular is a big plus), • 5+ years of experience in PHP development, • Strong understanding of OOP concepts, SOLID principles, Clean Architecture, and Design Patterns, • Hands-on experience with RDBMSs such as MySQL and PostgreSQL, • Hands-on experience with NoSQL databases such as MongoDB, Redis, and Couchbase, • Experience with third-party integrations, • No military obligation for male candidates, NICE TO HAVE • Strong knowledge of architectural patterns such as Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, and CQRS, • Experience with high-traffic applications, • Experience in Payment Systems, Financial Technologies, or Electronic Money institutions, • Experience with Agile methodologies and Scrum, • Experience using Jira, RabbitMQ, Confluence, and Git-based tools for software delivery, • Experience in code review processes and technical decision-making, JOB DESCRIPTION • Develop web solutions for Payment Systems and Financial Technologies in accordance with quality standards on specified platforms, • Design and maintain scalable backend systems, • Maintain and improve existing projects, • Keep up to date with the latest developments in FinTech and Information Technologies. *Remote work is available for this position. İlanımıza başvurmanız durumunda, Çalışan Adayı Aydınlatma Metni’ni okuduğunuz ve kişisel verilerinizin söz konusu metinde belirtilen kapsamda işlenmesine ilişkin bilgilendirildiğiniz kabul edilecektir.

title: Full Stack Developer (.Net+Vue.js)
description: We have come a long way from being an ambitious start-up to becoming a fully export-oriented offshore development center serving a long list of prestigious clients across the globe; enriching our experience, expertise, and portfolio along the way. After a humble start with open source technologies, we worked our way up into becoming an authority on a number of key fields- the development of large enterprise applications, mobile applications, applications that facilitate hardware-software interaction to name a few. Following the motto “Consistently delivering quality solutions”, our team currently has 10 exclusive niche techies, with 100+ successful projects under their belts, covering a very wide range of technologies, solutions, and industry verticals. We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to join Path team. Requirements 8+ years of professional software development experience Deep understanding and demonstrated expertise in .Net Framework and C# libraries Minimum 5 years Vue.js knowledge is must Expert in .Net Technologies (MVC, Web Forms) and C# language Experience in RESTful & SOAP service technologies Knowledge of object-oriented programming Experience in relational databases, ability to write functions Experience with MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB Experience with Redis, Docker and RabbitMQ Capable of writing unit tests Deep understanding of Microservices Technologies Nice to have Experience with Websocket Experience with Elastic Search Experience with Cloud technologies

title: Senior Laravel Developer
description: About Zippd Zippd is in an exciting phase of rapid growth. As we scale our operations and technology, we are expanding our engineering team to build the next generation of our platform. We are looking for a highly capable Senior Laravel Developer to step in and take full ownership of our backend infrastructure. You will not just be writing code; you will be driving the architecture, making critical technical decisions, and leading the implementation of our backend capabilities from the ground up. The Mission You will be architecting high-performance, scalable backend systems designed to solve high-impact, real-world challenges across our logistics network. Expect to tackle complex problems involving high-traffic transaction systems, deep database optimization, robust API development, and seamless third-party integrations to power our core operations. The Role We are looking for a Laravel engineer who treats PHP as a scalable backend engine, not a scripting language. You will take complete ownership of designing and deploying sophisticated, clean-architecture backend systems that drive real value for the business. Core Stack Framework: Laravel (latest versions) Database & ORM: Eloquent ORM optimization and MySQL performance tuning Testing: TDD (PHPUnit / Pest) Infrastructure: Redis / Queue systems API Integrations: Designing, building, and consuming third-party API integrations (REST, JSON, webhooks) Frontend Integration: Inertia.js or Livewire Preferred Edge Architecture: Deep understanding of Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, and the Repository pattern Scale: Proven history of building and maintaining high-traffic production systems Requirements Experience: 5+ years of heavy Laravel development experience API Development: 6-7+ years of hands-on API development experience. You must have deep, demonstrable experience designing, building, securing, and maintaining production APIs, this is a core requirement for the role Third-Party Integrations: Proven experience integrating with external APIs, handling authentication, webhooks, error handling, and data consistency across systems Scale Management: Direct experience managing complex, high-traffic applications Database Mastery: Strong SQL indexing and performance tuning skills Leadership: Architectural oversight capability and a proven track record of mentoring other developers Communication: Excellent and fluent English speaking skills are absolutely essential. This is a fully remote role, so you must be able to communicate clearly and confidently, explaining complex technical logic to both product teams and non-technical stakeholders Working Model: This is a 100% remote position. You must be comfortable working independently, collaborating effectively across video calls, and staying aligned with product and DevOps teams remotely Compensation Salary: Competitive and negotiable based on experience

title: Backend Developer
description: One platform, unlimited solutions! With its Fintech 2.0 vision, Nakitera is digitizing your financial processes. Nakitera brings together management, operational efficiency, payment diversity, data security, and customer loyalty solutions on a single platform. It simplifies businesses' financial processes, reduces operational burdens with innovative technologies, and maximizes efficiency. Whether you are a small business or a large corporation, discover our end-to-end solutions for all your financial needs, explore the future of B2B fintech experience, and take your business processes into the future! 🚀 If you want to join us on Nakitera's growth journey, we are waiting for your applications for our " Backend Developer " position. Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field, Solid understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and design principles (SOLID, Clean Code, pragmatic design patterns), 5+ years of backend experience with Java and Spring Boot (or similar JVM-based frameworks), Hands-on experience with RESTful API design and development, Familiarity with SOAP and XML technologies, Experience with RabbitMQ, Kafka, or similar messaging systems, Experience in the payments/fintech domain is a strong plus, Experience with Unit Test Frameworks, Experience with AI-assisted coding tools (e.g., Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT) is a plus. Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable, high-performance backend services, Develop and enhance robust backend systems and APIs, Build and manage integrations related to payment systems and financial services, Apply best practices such as clean code and design principles to ensure high code quality, Maintain and optimize existing systems for performance, reliability, and scalability, Troubleshoot, debug, and improve system stability, Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing within the team. We eagerly await your applications. Nakitera People Team

title: Kıdemli Backend Geliştirici
description: Sorumluluklar Yeni geliştirmekte olduğumuz ve var olan ürünler üzerinde geliştirmeler yapmak ve uçtan uca destek vermek, Code Review ve dokümantasyon süreçlerine katkıda bulunmak Nitelikler .Net Core, C# tecrübesi olan 4+ yıl yazılım tecrübesi olan OpenAPI spesifikasyonlarına uygun RESTful API uygulamaları geliştirme konusunda deneyimli, İlişkisel ve ilişkisel olmayan veritabanları (PostgreSQL, MS-SQL, Mongo, Redis) ile çalışmış, EF Core, Dapper vb. ORM framework bilgisine sahip, Microservice mimarisi, Clean Architecture, Domain Driven Design, Object Oriented Programming prensipleri, Design Patterns, Dependency Injection konularına hakim, Event Driven Architecture deneyimi olan, RabbitMQ ve gRPC gibi kuyruk ve mesajlaşma altyapıları hakkında bilgi sahibi, CI/CD süreçleri ve Containerization konularında (Docker, Kubernetes) tecrübeli, Agile/Scrum hakkında bilgili Git kullanmış

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Full Stack Engineer based in Turkey. This is a high-impact engineering role focused on building across the full spectrum of a fast-evolving decentralized technology ecosystem. You will contribute to both user-facing applications and the core infrastructure that powers them, working at the intersection of product engineering, developer tooling, and platform systems. The environment is highly technical, fast-paced, and innovation-driven, where shipping quickly and iterating intelligently are key. You will be involved in everything from prototyping new ideas to scaling production-grade systems used by developers and end users alike. The role blends autonomy with deep technical ownership, allowing you to shape both what gets built and how it evolves. You will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams including DevRel, Product, and Business teams to ensure what you build is impactful, usable, and aligned with ecosystem growth. This is an opportunity to work on cutting-edge infrastructure with significant scale, performance, and ambition. Accountabilities Design and deliver end-to-end full stack products, including consumer applications, developer tools, and internal platform systems Build and maintain high-performance backend services and APIs supporting large-scale decentralized applications Develop developer-facing tools such as SDKs, CLIs, libraries, and starter kits to improve ecosystem adoption and usability Create internal tooling and infrastructure that improves engineering velocity and system reliability Own features across their full lifecycle, from rapid prototyping through production deployment and ongoing optimization Collaborate with cross-functional teams including DevRel, Marketing, and Business Development to align technical outputs with go-to-market needs Identify gaps in the ecosystem and proactively design and implement solutions to address them Ensure performance, reliability, and scalability across all layers of the stack Continuously improve systems through iteration, testing, and refinement based on real-world usage Requirements Strong experience with TypeScript across the full stack, including modern frontend frameworks and backend services Experience building production-grade front-end applications with attention to performance and usability Solid backend engineering skills, including APIs, service design, and data-layer architecture Familiarity with Golang is a plus for specific backend or performance-critical components Strong understanding or genuine interest in blockchain, crypto, or on-chain systems Proven ability to operate with high ownership, autonomy, and product-minded thinking Experience balancing fast prototyping with long-term production hardening and system reliability Comfortable working in fast-paced, high-growth technical environments Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify opportunities and act on them independently Ability to collaborate effectively across technical and non-technical stakeholders Benefits Opportunity to work on cutting-edge decentralized infrastructure with exceptional performance scale High-impact role spanning product, infrastructure, and developer ecosystem tooling Fast-paced, innovation-driven engineering environment Strong autonomy with ownership over features and systems from idea to production Collaboration with experienced teams across engineering, product, and ecosystem growth Exposure to advanced blockchain and high-throughput system architectures Opportunity to shape developer experience across a growing technical ecosystem Competitive compensation and growth opportunities within a rapidly evolving space Flexible working environment supporting focus and deep work How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: In 1991, we embarked on a mission to offer outstanding service and competitive prices to those who love to travel. Over the past 30+ years, our guest-focused mindset and innovative spirit have helped shape the tourism industry in Türkiye. As the country’s leading travel and tourism company, we market thousands of hotels and proudly host top brands under the Etstur umbrella, including Didimtur, Jetset, Ucuzabilet.com, Otelpuan.com, HotelAgent, Etscore, Etsevent and Let’s Go Magazine. We’re looking for talents to join us as we combine our industry expertise with technology and innovation to transform travel experiences and create user-friendly solutions. If you're ready to be part of a dynamic team in a fast-evolving sector and bring to life projects that will enhance how people travel, you’re in the right place! Join us and let’s design the holidays of the future together. Requirements Preferably a graduate of Computer Engineering or Software Engineering 3+ years of professional Java experience (design, develop, and maintain highly available and resilient applications) Experience with Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA/JDBC Strong knowledge of ElasticSearch, Kafka, and Memcached, SQL and relational databases (PostgreSQL is a plus) Multithreading and asynchronous programming experience Understanding of REST, GRPC, and SOAP standards Ability to adapt to agile software development methodologies such as Agile/Scrum Basic knowledge of GitHub, Jenkins and CI/CD Eagerness to learn new technologies and improve continuously Good understanding skills for analyzing business requirements and problem solving Strong communication skills and a team-oriented mindset For male candidates, completion of military service or a minimum of 2 years of postponement In addition, we are looking for the following qualifications on the frontend side (React): 1+ years of hands-on experience with React.js Familiarity with frontend tooling (Webpack, Vite, etc.) Solid understanding of component-based architecture and React Hooks Experience with state management tools like Redux & RTK Toolkit is plus Basic knowledge of UI libraries like Material-UI (MUI) is plus Ability to build responsive and user-friendly web interfaces Familiar with unit test tools like Jest, React-testing-library is plus

title: Full Stack Deverloper
description: Full-Stack Deverloper Magicline olarak, yenilikçi dijital ürünler geliştiren teknoloji ekibimize katılacak, web uygulamalarının hem frontend hem de backend süreçlerinde aktif rol alabilecek Full-Stack Yazılımcı arıyoruz. Kullanıcı dostu, güvenli, ölçeklenebilir ve yüksek kaliteli yazılım çözümleri geliştirme konusunda deneyimli; modern web teknolojilerine hâkim, analitik düşünebilen ve ekip çalışmasına yatkın adaylarla tanışmak istiyoruz. Genel Nitelikler ·        Üniversitelerin 4 yıllık Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya benzeri bölümlerinden mezun, ·        En az 5 yıllık tam zamanlı full-stack geliştirme deneyimine sahip, · React, JavaScript ve Node.js gibi modern web teknolojileriyle çalışmış, ·        Kullanıcı dostu ve etkili web uygulamaları geliştirme konusunda deneyimli, ·        Backend tarafında Node.js kullanarak ölçeklenebilir, güvenli ve yüksek kaliteli sistemlerin tasarım ve geliştirme süreçlerini yönetebilen, ·        Uygulama mimarisi ve Mikroservis mimarisi konusunda deneyimli; sistem bileşenlerini uygun şekilde tasarlama, entegrasyon gerçekleştirme ve kod kalitesini sürdürülebilir kılma konusunda yetkin, · PostgreSQL ve MS SQL veri tabanlarıyla çalışmış, veri tabanı yönetimi ve optimizasyonu konularında deneyimli, · Docker, Kubernetes, Redis ve benzeri DevOps araçlarına aşina; uygulamaların hızlı, güvenli ve yüksek kaliteli şekilde dağıtımına katkı sağlayabilecek ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Sorumluluklar Web tabanlı uygulamaların frontend ve backend geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak, React ve modern JavaScript teknolojileriyle kullanıcı dostu arayüzler geliştirmek, Node.js kullanarak güvenli, performanslı ve ölçeklenebilir backend servisleri oluşturmak, Uygulama mimarisinin tasarlanması, geliştirilmesi ve iyileştirilmesine katkı sağlamak, Mikroservis mimarisiyle uyumlu servis yapılarının geliştirilmesine destek olmak, PostgreSQL ve MS SQL veri tabanlarında veri modelleme, sorgu geliştirme ve performans optimizasyonu yapmak, Docker, Kubernetes, Redis ve benzeri araçlarla geliştirme, test ve yayın süreçlerine katkıda bulunmak, Kod kalitesini, güvenliği ve sürdürülebilirliği artıracak en iyi yazılım geliştirme pratiklerini uygulamak, Ekip içi teknik değerlendirmelere, kod incelemelerine ve ürün geliştirme süreçlerine aktif katkı sağlamak. Aranan Teknik Yetkinlikler React JavaScript Node.js PostgreSQL MS SQL Mikroservis mimarisi Docker Kubernetes Redis RESTful API geliştirme Web uygulama mimarisi Backend sistem tasarımı DevOps süreçlerine aşinalık Tercihen Ölçeklenebilir SaaS veya mobil uygulama destekli backend sistemlerinde çalışmış, CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi, Performans, güvenlik ve veri tabanı optimizasyonu konularında deneyimli, Teknik dokümantasyon ve kod standartları konusunda titiz adaylar tercih sebebidir. Biz Ne Sunuyoruz? Yenilikçi ve büyüme odaklı bir teknoloji ürününde aktif rol alma fırsatı, Modern teknolojilerle çalışma imkânı, Ürün geliştirme süreçlerinde söz sahibi olabileceğiniz dinamik bir ekip ortamı, Öğrenmeye, gelişime ve teknik katkıya açık çalışma kültürü, Başvuru Magicline teknoloji ekibine katılmak ve yenilikçi dijital çözümler geliştiren bir yapının parçası olmak istiyorsan başvurunu bekliyoruz.

title: React Native Developer
description: 📱 React Native Developer We’re building a fintech product that people rely on — and we’re looking for a React Native Developer who wants to take real ownership of the mobile experience. You’ll take over a live product, shape how it evolves, and directly impact how users experience it every day. If you care about building smooth, high-quality products and want your work to actually matter — keep reading. 📱 What You’ll Do? Own the mobile app end-to-end — from development to continuous improvement, Work closely with product and design to build intuitive, high-quality experiences, Make decisions that directly impact performance, scalability, and code quality, Step beyond mobile when needed and contribute across the stack. 📱 Tech Stack React Native Expo (Bare Workflow) React Native Reanimated TanStack (Query, etc.) 📱 Who You Are? 5+ years of experience in mobile and software development, You’ve owned and scaled a live production app before, You care about UI/UX and build interfaces that feel right, You can design and build reusable components (forms, dropdowns, etc.), You write clean, maintainable, and scalable code, You’re comfortable navigating both mobile and web when needed. What We Offer?🎁 • Competitive Compensation: Contribution-based salary that reflects your impact. • Meal Allowance & Snacks: Enough for a solid meal and tasty snacks to keep you energized. • Health Insurance • Learning & Development Support: Annual budget for courses and educational platforms to keep your skills sharp. • Meaningful Time Off: • Standard annual leave • Birthday off • Mental health / “headspace” days • Menstrual leave / period support • Welcome / onboarding day off • Parental leave • Pet care leave • Career break • Official / personal business leave • Modern, Comfortable Office in Kadıköy: Bright, central location, designed to keep you in the “zone.” • Office Hours: 10:00 – 18:00 • Game & Chill Areas: Dedicated gaming corners for breaks and quick relaxation sessions. • Fun Office Events: Regular happy hours, team moments, and in-office events throughout the year 📱 Why Join Us? You won’t just write code — you’ll shape the product Your ideas will be heard and implemented quickly We move fast, but we care about doing things right No unnecessary hierarchy — impact is what matters You’ll work with people who constantly ask: “How can we make this better?” 📱 Hiring Process Application: Send us your CV Intro Interview: Let’s get to know each other Case Study: Show us how you think and build Final Interview: Align on expectations and culture Offer & Onboarding
